channel.title: Swift on Blog | Peng-Yu Chen
channel.description: Recent content in Swift on Blog | Peng-Yu Chen

item.title: Swift Style Guide
item.description: Swift Style Guide Updated for Swift 5.0 The goals are clarity, consistency and brevity, in that order. Clarity at the point of use. Codes should always be consistent within one data set. Pay attention to spelling and case; most frequent problems are with abbreviations. Clarity is more important than brevity. Write a documentation comment. References This guide mainly follows: Swift.org - API Design Guidelines raywenderlich/swift-style-guide Swift Style Guide Formatting Column Limit Swift code has a column limit of 100 characters.
